title: opencode
html:
opencode

Command Execution

opencode
! /path/to/command

Inherit

This allows to run SQLite queries (`...`) provided that `sqlite3` is installed.

opencode db '...'
excerpt: opencode Command Execution opencode ! /path/to/command Inherit This allows to run SQLite queries (`...`) provided that `sqlite3` is installed. opencode db '...'
